description_long: This armchair features a wide, inviting seat and gently sloped armrests, all upholstered in a warm, golden-brown fabric with a prominent quilted diamond pattern. The backrest is rounded and curves smoothly into the armrests, providing a cocoon-like enclosure for comfort. The upholstery is tightly fitted, with the diamond quilting adding both texture and visual interest across the entire surface. The chair stands on four short, tapered wooden legs stained a dark brown, giving it a stable and slightly elevated stance. The overall silhouette is modern yet plush, with ample padding visible throughout the seat, back, and arms. This design would suit both indoor urban lounges and stylish outdoor patios.
description: A plush, golden-brown armchair with quilted diamond upholstery, rounded backrest, and dark tapered wooden legs. The chair exudes comfort and modern style with its wide seat and enveloping armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, high rounded backrest, and sloped armrests with the diamond quilted pattern fully visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the outward flare of the armrest and the gentle curve of the backrest, with the chair's depth and leg shape visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous rounded back and the full extent of the diamond quilting, with only the back legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's angle, the seat's depth, and the curvature of the backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered with diamond quilting
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, and fully upholstered with continuous diamond quilting
attribute_leg_type: short, tapered wooden legs stained dark brown
